---
title: "Minh Chau"
author: Minh Chau
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output:
  pagedown::html_resume:
  # set it to true for a self-contained HTML page but it'll take longer to render
    css: ["resume", "custom.css"]
    self_contained: true
---

Aside
================================================================================

<div style="margin-top:-40px;">
Contact {#contact}
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
</div>

- <i class="fa fa-envelope" style ="margin-left:-36px;"></i> [Email](mailto:minh.chau@outlook.co.nz)
- <i class="fa fa-github" style ="margin-left:-36px;margin-top:5px;"></i> [Github](https://github.com/MinhChauVanNguyen)
- <i class="fa fa-home" style ="margin-left:-36px;margin-top:5px;"></i> [Portfolio](https://minhchauvannguyen.github.io/)

Packages {#skills}
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
- <strong>Statistical Programming:</strong> R, SQL
- <strong>Web development:</strong> Shiny, HTML, CSS
- <strong>Reporting:</strong> R Markdown, Latex
- <strong>Workflow:</strong> Github, Gitlab
- <strong>MS Office:</strong> Word, Excel, Power Point


Languages {#speak}
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

• Vietnamese (native) <br>
• English (fluent)


References {#references}
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

<div style="margin-top:15px">
• <strong>Shirley Wu</strong>
</div>
<div style="margin-left:11px;margin-top:-10px;">
Operation Manager <br>
Harmonic Analytics <br>
<span style="text-decoration:underline !important;">[shirley@harmonic.co.nz](mailto:shirley@harmonic.co.nz)</span> <br>
</div>

• <strong>Ploi Yibmantasiri</strong> 
<div style="margin-left:11px;margin-top:-10px;">
Data Scientist <br>
Harmonic Analytics <br>
<span style="text-decoration:underline !important;">[ploi@harmonic.co.nz](mailto:ploi@harmonic.co.nz)</span>
</div>

• <strong>Ge Guo</strong><br>
<div style="margin-left:11px;margin-top:-10px;">
Subway Owner <br>
<span style="text-decoration:underline !important;">[subway_cablecar@hotmail.com](mailto:subway_cablecar@hotmail.com)</span>
</div>

Main
================================================================================

Minh Chau {#title}
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
<span style="color:black;font-size:13px;">My career goals are to take part in working with meaningful projects using data-driven solutions and data visualization. I currently seek a suitable job to enhance my statistical and programming skills, practice new packages and contribute to the New Zealand society.</span>




Education {data-icon=graduation-cap data-concise=true}
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

### Master of Applied Statistics

<span style = "font-size:14px;">Victoria University of Wellington</span>

<span style = "font-size:14px;">Wellington, NZ</span>

03/2019 - 06/2020

### Bachelor of Science in Statistics

<span style = "font-size:14px;">Otago University</span>

<span style = "font-size:14px;">Dunedin, NZ</span>

03/2015 - 06/2019

<div style="margin-bottom:25px;">
</div>



Work Experience {data-icon=suitcase}
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

### Sessional Assistant

<span style = "font-size:14px;">Victoria University of Wellington</span>

<span style = "font-size:14px;">Wellington, NZ</span>

<div style = "margin-top:20px;font-size:13px;">

 - Marking 100-level statistics assignments
 - Attending to training and meetings 
 - Preparing for marking material
</div>

04/2020 - current

### Intern/Data Analyst

<span style = "font-size:14px;">Harmonic Analytics</span>

<span style = "font-size:14px;">Wellington, NZ</span>

<div style="margin-top:20px;font-size:13px;">

 - Wrangle and analyze time series data
 - Investigate different predictive modelling methods 
 - Produce a dashboard with interactive plots to present the results
 - Co-operate with supervisors to deliver according to the client’s requirements

</div>

03/2020 - 06/2020


### Sandwich Artist

<span style = "font-size:14px;">Subway</span>

<span style = "font-size:14px;">Wellington, NZ</span>

<div style="margin-top:20px;font-size:13px;">
 - Work in a busy team under pressure
 - Prepare orders neatly, according to formula, and in a timely manner
 - Adhere to proper food handling, safety and sanitation standards 
</div>


08/2018 - 12/2019
